chapter1/recipe1-1/end/football/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property in the Maven POM to target JDK 21.
chapter1/recipe1-1/end/football/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.
